_note: 2024 SRD species. No ability bonuses (those come from backgrounds). Traits, speed, size only.

traits: Resourceful (gain Heroic Inspiration on Long Rest)
Skillful (1 extra skill proficiency)
Versatile (gain 1 Origin feat)
Darkvision 60ft
Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charmed, immune to magic sleep)
Keen Senses (proficiency in Perception)
Trance (4hr long rest)
Darkvision 120ft
Dwarven Resilience (resistance to poison damage, advantage on saves vs poisoned)
Dwarven Toughness (+1 HP per level)
Stonecunning (tremorsense 60ft for 10min, PB uses/long rest)
Brave (advantage vs frightened)
Halfling Nimbleness (move through space of Medium+ creature)
Luck (reroll nat 1 on d20 Test, must use new roll)
Naturally Stealthy (can Hide behind Medium+ creature)
Darkvision 60ft
Gnomish Cunning (advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves)
Gnomish Lineage (choose Forest: speak with Small animals; or Rock: prestidigitation cantrip + mending cantrip)
Darkvision 120ft
Adrenaline Rush (Dash as bonus action, gain temp HP = PB, PB uses/long rest)
Relentless Endurance (drop to 1 HP instead of 0, 1/long rest)
Darkvision 60ft
Fiendish Legacy (choose Abyssal: poison resist + ray of sickness; Chthonic: necrotic resist + false life; Infernal: fire resist + hellish rebuke)
Otherworldly Presence (thaumaturgy cantrip)
Draconic Ancestry (choose type: determines damage type for breath weapon and resistance)
Breath Weapon (1d10 at 1st, scales; 15ft cone or 30ft line; DEX/CON save DC 8+CON+PB; PB uses/long rest)
Damage Resistance (from ancestry type)
Large Form (advantage on STR checks, count as Large for carry/push/lift)

Giant Ancestry (choose Cloud: misty step PB/long rest; Fire: fire resist + searing smite PB/long rest; Hill: temp HP on hit PB/long rest; Stone: stoneskin 10min 1/long rest; Storm: lightning resist + thunderwave PB/long rest)
Powerful Build (count as Large for carrying capacity)
Darkvision 60ft
Celestial Resistance (resist necrotic and radiant damage)
Healing Hands (restore PB HP to touched creature, 1/long rest)
Light Bearer (light cantrip)
Celestial Revelation (at 3rd: choose Heavenly Wings/Inner Radiance/Necrotic Shroud, 1/long rest, 1min duration)
